attempts.insight: Probe-confirmed `ComposableArrows.mkΓéà` body adopted verbatim. `noncomputable abbrev` (rather than `noncomputable def`) is load-bearing for downstream `dsimp`-based unfolding in iter-023+ `HModule'_sequenceIso` / iter-024+ `HModule'_sequence_exact`. The codomain `ComposableArrows AddCommGrpCat 5` is forced by the `AddCommGrpCat`-flavor of each individual building block (each lands in `AddCommGrpCat`-morphisms because iter-016 `HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n` always lands in `Cß╡Æß╡û ΓÑñ AddCommGrpCat`). `[HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]` typeclass is transitively load-bearing via `HModule'_╬┤`. The `mkΓéà` qualified call (no `open ComposableArrows`) follows the directive's guidance to keep the file's existing `open` directive untouched. lean_diagnostic_messages on the file post-Edit: zero errors, one cosmetic `linter.style.longLine` warning on a 101-column docstring line (fixed by Edit 2). lean_verify: kernel-only axioms `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.
